series_metadata.series_title: Corporate Franchise Tax Valuation Limitation on Gains
series_metadata.series_description: This is a one-part form and is used by corporations as a means of reporting allocable income to Ohio from the sale or exchange of property that received capital gains treatment. This is a supplemental schedule and will be attached to either the FT-1120 or FT-1120H.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 6 years from due date and then delete. ; Paper: Retain in files six (6) years from due date and destroy. Retain for 6 months after scanned., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Wastepaper
